inputs.label: Standard Reduction Potential (E°)
inputs.businessContext: The standard reduction potential of the half-reaction under standard conditions (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C).

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard reduction potential of the half-reaction under standard conditions (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart koşullar altında (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C) yarı reaksiyonun standart indirgenme potansiyeli.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Standard-Reduktionspotential der Halbreaktion unter Standardbedingungen (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le potentiel standard de réduction de la demi-réaction dans des conditions standard (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C).
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencial de reducción estándar de la semirreacción en condiciones estándar (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C).
businessContext_i18n.ar: جهد الاختزال القياسي لنصف التفاعل تحت الظروف القياسية (1 M، 1 ضغط جوي، 25°م).

inputs.label: Number of Electrons Transferred (n)
inputs.businessContext: Stoichiometric number of electrons in the half-reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stoichiometric number of electrons in the half-reaction.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stöchiometrische Anzahl der Elektronen in der Halbreaktion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre stœchiométrique d'électrons dans la demi-réaction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número estequiométrico de electrones en la semirreacción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الإلكترونات المتكافئة في نصف التفاعل.

inputs.label: Concentration of Oxidized Species [Ox]
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the oxidized species (reactant).

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar concentration of the oxidized species (reactant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración molar de la especie oxidada (reactivo).

inputs.label: Concentration of Reduced Species [Red]
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the reduced species (product).

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar concentration of the reduced species (product).
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración molar de la especie reducida (producto).

inputs.label: Stoichiometric Coefficient of Oxidized Species (a)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for the oxidized species in the balanced half-reaction: aOx + ne- → bRed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient for the oxidized species in the balanced half-reaction: aOx + ne- → bRed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dengeli yarı reaksiyondaki yükseltgenmiş türün katsayısı: aOx + ne- → bRed.
businessContext_i18n.de: Koeffizient für die oxidierte Spezies in der ausgeglichenen Halbreaktion: aOx + ne- → bRed.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient pour l'espèce oxydée dans la demi-réaction équilibrée : aOx + ne- → bRed.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de la especie oxidada en la semirreacción balanceada: aOx + ne- → bRed.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الأنواع المؤكسدة في نصف التفاعل المتوازن: aOx + ne- → bRed.

inputs.label: Stoichiometric Coefficient of Reduced Species (b)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for the reduced species in the balanced half-reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient for the reduced species in the balanced half-reaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dengeli yarı reaksiyondaki indirgenmiş türün katsayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Koeffizient für die reduzierte Spezies in der ausgeglichenen Halbreaktion.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient pour l'espèce réduite dans la demi-réaction équilibrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de la especie reducida en la semirreacción balanceada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل الأنواع المختزلة في نصف التفاعل المتوازن.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Number of electrons must be positive.
